title: platform-user — published macros
description: This module publishes NO Blueprint macros. Foundation owns the cross-cutting infrastructure macros (`tenantable`, `userstamps`, `metadata`, `audit_columns`), and the platform_users + platform_profiles migrations use those foundation macros directly. There is no per-module column shape unique to platform-user that would warrant a dedicated macro. This file exists for uniform module shape — add a macro here only when a column pattern emerges that is genuinely reused across multiple platform-user-related tables (e.g. a future `platform_impersonation_sessions` table might warrant a `platform_actor_columns` macro that stamps platform_user_id + tenure_at_action). For now, empty.
namespace_note: Blueprint macros are a Laravel core convention on `Illuminate\Database\Schema\Blueprint`. If we later add one, register it via `PlatformUserServiceProvider::boot()` alongside the model-observer wiring.
notes: The `on_call_rotation_key` column pattern (on platform_users only) is not a macro candidate — it appears in exactly one table.

The `employment lifecycle` column bundle (status, hire_date, offboarded_at, offboarding_reason, employment_type, department, job_title) is candidate for a future `employment_columns` macro if `identity/service-accounts` or another module needs the same shape. Track in the retention-follow-up backlog.
